caption: A man with grey-blonde hair, glasses, and black headphones speaks into a black microphone. He is wearing a white collared shirt with a red patterned bowtie and gold-colored suspenders. Behind him, a woman with bright pink hair wears a green dress. The setting appears to be a studio or office, featuring a black backdrop with the words "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed shield logo on the wall. Red and white on-screen graphics are present, including a circular logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101". As the scene progresses, the man continues speaking, and his right arm and hand move into the frame, gesturing as he talks. The other elements of the scene, including the woman and the background, remain stationary.
